Please fasten your seatbelt.
When the plane lands, you turn on your phone.
After you leave the plane, you go to immigration.
Before you leave customs, you show your passport.
When there is turbulence, you fasten your seatbelt.
Welcome on board, sir. Please fasten your seatbelt before we take off.
Of course. When can I open my tray table?
After the plane takes off, you can open it. The cabin crew will serve drinks soon.
Thank you. And what do I do when there is turbulence?
When the sign is on, stay in your seat and keep your seatbelt fastened. Before we land, please close your tray table.
Got it. After we land, where do I go for immigration?
Just follow the signs after you leave the plane. Immigration is first, and customs is after that.

Good afternoon, and welcome on board. This is your cabin crew speaking. Before take-off, please fasten your seatbelt and close your tray table. During the flight, when the seatbelt sign is on, please stay in your seat, because there may be some turbulence. We will serve drinks after the plane takes off. Before we land, the crew will check the cabin one more time, so please close your tray table again. When the plane lands and stops at the gate, you can turn on your phone. After you leave the plane, follow the signs to immigration first, and then to customs. Thank you for flying with us, and enjoy your stay.

My flight to the new city was long, but it was comfortable. Before take-off, I fastened my seatbelt and listened to the cabin crew. After the plane took off, I opened my tray table and read a book. In the middle of the flight there was some turbulence, so I stayed in my seat with my seatbelt on. When the plane landed, I felt happy and a little tired. After I left the plane, I followed the signs to immigration, and the officer checked my passport. At customs, I had nothing to declare, so I walked straight through. When I came out, my adventure abroad finally began.

Before take-off, Roberto fastens his seatbelt in his seat. During the flight, when there is turbulence, he stays in his seat. When the plane lands, he turns on his phone. After he leaves the plane, he goes to immigration with his passport. Finally, at customs, he has nothing to declare and walks through.
